therefore if the same revenue center date appears on two different claims then it is counted as two 
visits. 
This algorithm includes all claims regardless of CLM_PMT_AMT. 
SHORT NAME: — 
LONG NAME: HOP_VISITS 
TYPE: 
NUM 
LENGTH: 
6 
SOURCE: 
CCW (derived) 
VALUES: 
Null/missing or 1–XXX 
COMMENT: 
The CLM_THRU_DT must have been in the year of the data file. 
ER visits in the HOP setting are counted in this variable (also reference HOP_ER_VISITS).
